offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, poor retention insights cause missed renewal opportunities. We provide automated health reports instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inability to accurately measure customer retention and forecast renewal rates.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Indie Hackers discussions on retention metrics
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among Shopify owners
try_it: Let users try retention metrics dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing customer data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
